source_areas.description: Organization profile, policies, and default GitHub intake templates for public Flyto2 repositories.
Organization-owned reusable security, SBOM, CodeQL, and documentation workflow implementations.

feature_surfaces.title: Organization profile
feature_surfaces.description: Publishes the canonical GitHub organization introduction and discovery links for Flyto2 users and contributors.
verification: Review rendered GitHub organization profile and all canonical links

feature_surfaces.title: Community intake
feature_surfaces.description: Provides default issue and discussion forms for bugs, ideas, contributions, questions, and public showcases.
verification: Validate GitHub issue and discussion form YAML during pull-request review

feature_surfaces.title: Reusable security gates
feature_surfaces.description: Exposes reusable secret, dependency, CodeQL, SBOM, and vulnerability scanning workflows to Flyto2 repositories.
verification: Caller repositories execute the reusable workflows in GitHub Actions

feature_surfaces.title: Documentation contract
feature_surfaces.description: Validates required project memory, feature-to-source ownership, documentation targets, local links, naming, and contact domains.
